parsed.recommendation_text: For an office desk setup, the Anker Prime 100W charger stands out due to its high wattage and compact form factor. It can simultaneously charge a laptop and smartphone efficiently, making it ideal for multi-device users. Despite being slightly heavier than alternatives, its build quality is excellent and it supports PPS for fast charging. The premium price is justified by the superior performance and reliability, aligning well with your brand familiarity preference.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances high wattage, compact form factor, and reliable brand reputation.
